pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 15: JOB_NAME="Payment-Gateway-Deploy"; export_result.sh line 8: JOB_NAME="Payment-Gateway-Deploy"

setup_task.sh defines three parameters: line 27 (ARTIFACT_TAG - hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition), line 33 (REGION - hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition), line 45 (FORCE_RESTART - hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition). Parameters extracted in export_result.sh lines 24-26 using these exact names. Parameters verified in verifier.py lines 38-40 (actual_tag, actual_region, actual_restart)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Jenkins job named 'Payment-Gateway-Deploy' with three parameters: ARTIFACT_TAG (string), REGION (choice), and FORCE_RESTART (boolean). The setup script generates three initial builds, with Build #3 serving as the failed deployment that the agent must retry. Build #3 is created with a randomized tag pattern (paygw-2024.10.12-rc8-x{RANDOM_SUFFIX}), a randomly selected region from [us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-central-1, ap-northeast-1], and FORCE_RESTART=false. The agent must identify Build #3's parameters and trigger a new build with the same ARTIFACT_TAG and REGION but with FORCE_RESTART set to true.
